title: Legal Market Detail
description: Single legal-market readiness summary surface. Drill target from control-plane.markets.management. Displays market readiness dimensions, launch tier, mandated/default-on/eligible/excluded packs. Directly bound to 1 OpenAPI operation (getLegalMarketProfile). Claim surface shows full readiness detail including internal-only states (informational — does not modify market definitions). Entry point for bootstrap workflow targeting this market (same-workspace navigation to control-plane.tenants.bootstrap with market context). Country-regulatory pack variation affects content (readiness dimensions, packs vary by market), not surface visibility. PH.json instance provides concrete evidence of displayed data.

dataSources.description: Legal-market profile summary — mandated/default-on/eligible/excluded packs, readiness dimensions, launch tier.
